rows.label: qev050405_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Move! Move!
Damn it! You piece of junk!
Why did you have to break down now...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0002
rows.name:
...The fault lies not with the Doll.
Ezich, your skills were simply inadequate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0004
rows.name:
I do not know who you are,
but thank you for pulling Ezich back from the path of wickedness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0005
rows.name:
Please, accept this.
It is a token of gratitude from the both of us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0006
rows.name:
...No, please do not hesitate.
If you do not accept it, we will be straying from the Larsian path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0007
rows.name:
Regardless, Ezich.
You disrespected your parents, sullied the honor of a duel,
and insulted the Lars... You have committed grave offenses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0008
rows.name: You know what that means, do you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0009
rows.name:
Eek! Y-you're going to make me slit my belly?!
Mom, please! Just spare my life!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Hey, [ST:playername ]!
If things keep going like this, who knows what they'll do to me.
I'm begging you, save me again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_SEL0011
rows.name: Advise De Soghu to go easy on him.

rows.label: qev050405_SEL0021
rows.name:
Coldly state that it's better to thoroughly
beat his character into shape.

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0011
rows.name:
Yes, he is still my beloved child.
I intend to... make it as painless as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0012
rows.name:
You are right.
I have spoiled him far too much until now.
I... will steel my resolve and do what must be done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0013
rows.name:
I-I knew it!!
Eeeeeeeek!
I'm going to be kiiiiiiiilled![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0014
rows.name:
Fool... What parent would let their beloved son die?
However, I must properly fulfill my parental duty.
I will harden my heart and beat you into shape![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050405_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Now, let's go!
From this moment on, you will become a Larsian
in the truest sense of the word.[ST:wait ]
